event: View of the Academy of Arts building and Neva River embankment in St. Petersburg
description: A pen-and-ink or woodcut-style print depicts a view along a stone embankment of a wide river. In the foreground at left, a large flat-bottomed barge is moored to the quay. The embankment extends into the distance with a stone railing and periodic bollards. A multi-arched bridge spans the river in the middle ground. On the far bank, a large neoclassical building with a columned portico and pediment (the Academy of Arts) dominates the skyline. Additional buildings line the opposite bank. The sky is rendered with light hatching. The artist's signature appears at the lower right.
